maturity.description: Currently using Hubspot for CRM and Marketing Automation, along with Power BI for analytics and BigQuery for data warehousing. Data is primarily collected from the website and activation is done through email.
keyChanges: Integrate existing tools for data coherence
Basic email campaigns from Hubspot

maturity.description: Initiating data integration with basic reporting and automated campaigns set up. Slightly advanced segmentation based on basic user data.
keyChanges: Adding basic analytics dashboards
Implementing simple segmented email campaigns

maturity.description: Ready to implement a Customer Data Platform (CDP) for advanced analytics and personalized marketing campaigns. Greater emphasis on user engagement channels.
keyChanges: Implementing a CDP for enhanced personalization
Real-time data synchronization across platforms

maturity.description: Fully optimized architecture with real-time data processing, automated personalized marketing campaigns across multiple channels, and complete analytics integration.
keyChanges: Automated advanced decision-making through AI-driven insights
Robust multi-channel engagement strategies using real-time data

useCases.name: Basic Email Campaigns
useCases.description: Executing targeted email campaigns using Hubspot.

useCases.name: Automated Reporting
useCases.description: Automated generation of reports using Power BI.

maturity.description: The organization is using basic data sources and tools without advanced integration.
keyChanges: Basic data collection from Website, ERP, and Social Media.
Limited use of tools for analysis and marketing automation.

maturity.description: The organization begins to integrate data across multiple platforms for better analysis.
keyChanges: Introduced a data warehouse for centralizing data.
Enhanced marketing efforts through automated campaigns.

maturity.description: The organization enhances its marketing capabilities with real-time data and analytics.
keyChanges: Integrated real-time analytics for timely decision-making.
Used personalization in marketing communications.

maturity.description: The organization utilizes advanced analytics and AI for continuous optimization.
keyChanges: Adoption of AI-driven features for predicting customer behavior.
Full integration of all tools for seamless data flow.

useCases.name: Lead Nurturing Campaign
useCases.description: Automate and enhance the lead nurturing process to improve conversion rates.
useCases.businessImpact: Increased lead conversion and reduced churn rate.

useCases.name: Customer Feedback Collection
useCases.description: Collect customer feedback to improve services and products.
useCases.businessImpact: Improved product offerings based on customer input.

journey.entryCriteria: Survey created and ready to deploy

useCases.name: Content Personalization Strategy
useCases.description: Develop personalized content to enhance user experience.
useCases.businessImpact: Higher user engagement with targeted content.

steps.label: Analyze user data to determine preferences

journey.entryCriteria: User initiates a session on the website
journey.exitCriteria: User completes an action based on personalized content

useCases.name: Sales Reporting and Analytics
useCases.description: Generate sales reports and insights from collected data.
useCases.businessImpact: Better sales strategies leading to higher revenues.

steps.label: Collect and aggregate sales data from warehouse

journey.entryCriteria: Sales data must be ready for reporting
journey.exitCriteria: Report finalized and distributed to the team

useCases.name: Marketing Campaign Effectiveness Measurement
useCases.description: Measure the effectiveness of various marketing campaigns.

journey.entryCriteria: Campaign has ended and results are available

useCases.name: New Product Launch Campaign
useCases.description: Manage the end-to-end process of launching a new product.
useCases.businessImpact: Successful product launch contributing to brand growth.

journey.exitCriteria: Product has been brought to market

maturity.description: InnooRyze is initially utilizing basic tools for data collection and marketing automation with limited capabilities.
keyChanges: Focused on using Hubspot for CRM and marketing automation.
Started using Power BI for analytics.

maturity.description: Integration of additional data sources and analytics capabilities to enhance decision-making processes.
keyChanges: Implementation of data synchronization with new sources.
Basic marketing personalization using Hubspot.

maturity.description: Adoption of a Customer Data Platform (CDP) to facilitate real-time customer interactions and personalized marketing.
keyChanges: Implemented a Customer Data Platform for advanced personalization.
Strengthened analytics with real-time data processing using BigQuery.

maturity.description: Full integration and automation of marketing processes, utilizing advanced analytics and personalization techniques.
keyChanges: Automated multi-channel marketing campaigns through real-time data.
Utilized advanced analytics to continuously optimize performance.

useCases.name: Lead Generation
useCases.description: Capture leads from the website and nurture through email marketing.
useCases.businessImpact: Increased market reach and engagement with potential customers.

journeys.name: Lead Capture Journey
journeys.outcome: Lead captured and added to CRM

useCases.name: Customer Onboarding
useCases.description: Guide new customers through the onboarding process via email.
useCases.businessImpact: Faster onboarding leads to increased customer retention.

journey.entryCriteria: Customer signs up for the service.

useCases.name: Customer Feedback Collection
useCases.description: Gather feedback from customers to assess satisfaction and improve offerings.
useCases.businessImpact: Enhanced product offerings based on customer feedback.

journey.exitCriteria: Feedback has been logged and analyzed.

useCases.name: Personalized Marketing Campaigns
useCases.description: Leverage customer data to run targeted marketing campaigns.
useCases.businessImpact: Increased customer engagement and conversion rates.

steps.label: Did customers engage with the campaign?

useCases.name: Real-Time Engagement Tracking
useCases.description: Track customer interactions in real-time to improve engagement strategies.
goals: Adapt strategies based on current interactions
useCases.businessImpact: Improved customer interaction and satisfaction due to timely responses.

useCases.name: Churn Prediction
useCases.description: Predict and analyze customer churn to take proactive measures.
useCases.businessImpact: Proactive retention efforts lead to longer customer lifetime and satisfaction.

steps.label: Customer retained or marked for follow-up

journey.entryCriteria: Customer usage metrics indicate a drop.
journey.exitCriteria: Customer is either retained or targeted for further follow-up.
